news.headline: Pinnacle West announces quarterly dividend of $0.895 per share of common stock, payable on March 3, 2025.
news.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. announced today in Phoenix that they will be paying a quarterly dividend of $0.895 for each share of common stock held by investors. This dividend is set to be distributed on March 3, 2025.

news.headline: Future IPO market trends in 2025 remain uncertain; analysts predict a rise to 2000 IPOs, worth $500 billion collectively.
Power Integrations in San Jose earns Great Place To Work Certification for third year in a row.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Power Integrations has been awarded Great Place To Work Certification for the third year in a row.

news.headline: Canada's dried flower exports more than doubled in 3Q24, reaching record levels in October, with exports totaling $20.18 million that month. Germany leads in import growth, with Canada's export market set to surpass $187.5 million by 2024.
news.summary: Canada's dried flower exports have experienced impressive growth, doubling year-over-year in the third quarter of 2024 and reaching record levels in October. Senior analyst Pablo Zuanic highlights the thriving international market, with Germany emerging as a key driver. In October 2024, Canadian dried flower exports hit a record high of $20.18 million, poised to exceed $187.5 million by year-end, up from $120 million in 2023 and $96 million in 2022. Third-quarter 2024 exports totaled C$69 million, a 106% increase year-over-year and a 19% rise quarter-over-quarter. Zuanic predicts further growth in the fourth quarter, potentially reaching C$85 million, an 87% jump year-over-year. Australia remains the largest importer of Canadian dried flowers, with Germany rapidly increasing its share - accounting for 26% of total exports in 3Q24, up from 28% the previous year.

news.headline: Six Flags-Cedar Fair merger unlocks $200 million in synergies. Jefferies analyst initiates Buy rating with $59.00 target price.
news.summary: Analyst David Katz from Jefferies has issued coverage on Six Flags Entertainment Corporation (NYSE:FUN) with a Buy rating and a price target set at $59.00. Katz is optimistic about the long-term potential stemming from the merger between Six Flags and Cedar Fair. Following the merger on July 1, the combined entity, now known as Six Flags Entertainment Corporation, is expected to benefit significantly from Cedar Fair’s management expertise in maximizing earnings. Katz foresees a seamless integration process, given the minimal geographic overlap of the parks owned by both companies. The analyst anticipates that Cedar Fair’s management will be able to capitalize on the assets of Six Flags and generate substantial value.

news.headline: Pudgy Penguins NFTs soar over $100K amid Solana airdrop excitement, attracting traders seeking allocations.
news.summary: The value of both a Pudgy Penguin and a Bitcoin has surpassed $100,000, due to the increasing popularity of NFT projects. Traders are actively seeking airdrop allocations in this surging market.

news.headline: Verrica grants COO David Zawitz 950,000 shares of stock as inducement for employment, per Nasdaq listing rule.
news.summary: In West Chester, Pennsylvania, on December 9, 2024, Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. unveiled that the company's Compensation Committee provided David Zawitz, the newly appointed Chief Operating Officer, a nonqualified stock option for acquiring 950,000 shares of common stock through the Inducement Plan that came into effect on the same day. This grant was a significant inducement for Mr. Zawitz to join Verrica, aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Goldman Sachs analyst initiates Buy rating on OneStream (NASDAQ:OS) with $37 price target. Revenue growth and innovation key.
news.summary: Analyst Adam Hotchkiss from Goldman Sachs recently started covering OneStream, Inc. (NASDAQ: OS) and gave it a Buy rating along with a price target of $37. Hotchkiss emphasized the company's impressive revenue growth and customer retention since FY23 in the face of a tough software market. He praised OneStream's CPM platform for its consistency and highlighted the strong demand it continues to generate. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas gives $2 million through 20 members to assist 33 organizations in preventing heirs' property issues.
news.summary: In Dallas, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) has provided $2 million in grants through the Heirs’ Property Program to aid 33 organizations across Arkansas, Mississippi, Louisiana, and Texas. The initiative aims to address heirs’ property concerns. Greg Hettrick, the senior vice president and director of Community Investment at FHLB Dallas, expressed delight at the widespread support for the program. He mentioned the gratification in aiding numerous organizations and individuals impacted by this issue.

news.headline: Oxford Industries (NYSE:OXM) Q3 earnings reported on Dec 11, 2024, missed estimated earnings by -222%, with EPS at $-0.11.
news.summary: Oxford Industries (NYSE: OXM) released its Q3 earnings on Wednesday, December 11, 2024 at 04:05 PM. The company reported an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.11, falling short of estimated earnings by -222.00%. This information was shared in a detailed earnings report.

news.headline: Champions Oncology (NASDAQ:CSBR) surpassed estimated earnings by 400% in Q2 report released on Dec 11, 2024.
news.summary: On Wednesday, December 11, 2024, Champions Oncology (NASDAQ: CSBR) disclosed its Q2 earnings report at 04:00 PM. The latest announcement revealed that the company exceeded estimated earnings by a substantial margin of 400.0%, reporting an impressive EPS of... This financial update is crucial for investors seeking insight into the company's performance.

news.headline: Cannabis REIT Chicago Atlantic REFI (NASDAQ:REFI) offers 13%+ yield with a safe return, boasting an 18% yield to maturity. Loan portfolio includes $559 million pipeline and 32% YOY growth. 4.6% of loans in non-accrual status. Top states for loans are Maryland, Pennsylvania, and Missouri.
news.summary: Chicago Atlantic REFI (NASDAQ:REFI), a standout in the cannabis finance sector, has received an "Overweight" rating from senior analyst Pablo Zuanic at Zuanic & Associates. The company offers a near 14% dividend yield, providing a less volatile way to invest in the cannabis market. Their loan portfolio boasts a yield to maturity (YTM) of over 18%, indicating the potential average annual return from its loans, with only 4.6% of loans in non-accrual status, showcasing robust risk management. They have shown strong growth potential with new loans up 32% year-over-year, supported by a $559 million pipeline and potential increases in demand from states like Pennsylvania and Virginia with potential cannabis legalization. Top states in their loan portfolio include Maryland (14%), Pennsylvania (12%), and Missouri (10%). As per Zuanic, REFI presents an attractive option for investors serious about the industry.

news.headline: Luigi Mangione's Reddit and Instagram accounts were deactivated after the arrest in the killing of UnitedHealthcare's CEO. Goodreads account still active. Digital profiles vanish post-controversy, timely action or scrutiny?
news.summary: Following the arrest of Luigi Mangione for the murder of UnitedHealthcare's CEO, his social media profiles garnered immediate attention. This incident raises the question of when corporations decide to erase digital footprints.

news.headline: PepsiCo names Christine Tammara as Senior VP and Controller, succeeding Marie Gallagher who will retire in May 2025.
news.summary: Christine Tammara has been appointed as the new Senior Vice President and Controller of PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP), effective May 3, 2025. She will be replacing Marie Gallagher, who is set to retire in May 2025. This change was announced on December 11, 2024, in Purchase, N.Y. Marie Gallagher currently holds the position that Tammara will succeed.

news.headline: Diebold Nixdorf prices $950 million senior secured notes offering at 7.750% due 2030.
news.summary: Diebold Nixdorf, Inc. in North Canton, Ohio, revealed the pricing of its recent Notes Offering, consisting of $950.0 million aggregate principal amount of 7.750% Senior Secured Notes due 2030. This offering was announced today and is marked as a significant move by the Company.

news.headline: Martin Midstream Partners files investor presentation with SEC, highlighting pending transaction with MRMC benefiting unitholders.
news.summary: KILGORE, Texas—Martin Midstream Partners L.P. (MMLP) disclosed that they have submitted an investor presentation to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission regarding the impending deal with Martin Resource Management Corporation (MRMC), which aims to optimize value for the unitholders. The Conflicts Committee and the Board of Directors of Martin Midstream GP LLC (the GP Board) have jointly endorsed that unitholders go ahead with the transaction, with their full support. The presentation highlights the proposed deal between MMLP and MRMC, emphasizing the benefits it offers to the unitholders. The Company's announcement signals a strategic move to enhance value proposition and cater to the interests of the stakeholders, presenting a profitable opportunity for future investments.

news.headline: Kroger reaffirms plan to lower prices, initiates $7.5B share buyback program. Focus on investing in America, raising wages, and supporting communities.
news.summary: Reaffirming dedication to investing in the United States to decrease grocery costs, boost employee salaries, and bolster local neighborhoods; the company underscores the robustness of its value creation strategy and the momentum to fuel enduring, sustainable development. The Board of Directors has approved a $7.5 billion share repurchase initiative.

news.headline: Coca-Cola names Henrique Braun EVP & COO, effective Jan 1, 2025, overseeing all global operating units. Reported to CEO Quincey.
news.summary: In Atlanta today, The Coca-Cola Company revealed the appointment of Henrique Braun as the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, starting on Jan. 1, 2025. Braun will take charge of all global operating units for the company in this new position. Reporting directly to Chairman and CEO James Quincey, Braun, who currently holds the position of EVP and President, International Development, supervises operations in Latin America, Japan, South Korea, ASEAN, and South P.

news.headline: Office Properties Income Trust completes private exchange, exchanging $445 million of 2025 notes for 3.25% 2027 notes, cash, and 11.5 million shares.
news.summary: In Newton, Mass, Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) revealed the completion of a private exchange involving its 4.50% senior unsecured notes due 2025. The exchange included receiving about $445 million worth of new 3.25% senior secured notes due 2027 (the “2027 Notes”), cash to cover accrued interest on the exchanged 2025 Notes up to the closing date, and roughly 11.5 million shares of OPI common stock.

news.headline: Hennessy Advisors, Inc. (Nasdaq: HNNA) reports 46% increase in annual earnings per share, optimism in US market - CEO.
news.summary: In Novato, California, on December 11, 2024, Hennessy Advisors, Inc. (Nasdaq: HNNA) revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year closing on September 30, 2024. Neil Hennessy, the Chairman and CEO, highlighted the flourishing U.S. stock market and economy in 2024, driven by optimism. The company's report indicates robust numbers for the year in review.

news.headline: TechnipFMC to work on carbon capture project with NEP in UK East Coast Cluster, after financial close reached.
news.summary: TechnipFMC (NYSE: FTI) has received full notice to proceed for the initial all-electric integrated project by the Northern Endurance Partnership (NEP), formed by bp, Equinor, and TotalEnergies. NEP recently confirmed financial close and entered the execution phase of the carbon dioxide (CO2) transportation and storage infrastructure in the UK’s East Coast Cluster. This groundbreaking project marks a significant milestone in the energy sector, with NEP's commitment towards sustainable solutions, supported by a substantial investment from the involved companies.

news.headline: WesBanco, Inc. and Premier Financial Corp. shareholders approve merger agreement. Significant vote in favor of agreement.
news.summary: In Wheeling, West Virginia on December 11, 2024, WesBanco, Inc. (Nasdaq: WSBC) and Premier Financial Corp. (Nasdaq: PFC) revealed that shareholders of both companies have overwhelmingly voted in favor of adopting and approving all proposals. The votes reflect strong support from WesBanco and Premier shareholders.

news.headline: Eaton appoints Pete Denk president, Industrial Sector, and Antonio Galvao president Mobility, effective 2025.
news.summary: Dublin-based power management firm Eaton (NYSE:ETN) has appointed Pete Denk as the new president and COO of the Industrial Sector, starting on January 1, 2025. Denk will take over from Paulo Ruiz, who is set to become the new CEO after Craig Arnold retires on May 31, 2025. Denk's responsibilities will include overseeing Eaton's Aerospace, Mobility, Filtration, and Golf Pride divisions. The succession plan aims to ensure a smooth transition in key leadership positions within the company.

news.headline: Markem-Imaje introduces Ultraply range for scannable 2D barcodes with ribbons and labels.
news.summary: Downers Grove, Illinois - Markem-Imaje, a division of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global supplier of complete supply chain solutions and industrial marking and coding systems, unveiled its new Ultraply ribbons and self-adhesive labels collection on December 11, 2024. This latest addition to their product line showcases enhanced durability and quality in marking and coding solutions.

news.headline: Allient Inc. launches Allient Defense Solutions Business Unit to expand presence in high-growth markets. Nasdaq: ALNT.
news.summary: In Buffalo, New York, Allient Inc. (Nasdaq: ALNT) has introduced its new business unit Allient Defense Solutions (ADS), emphasizing the company's dedication to growth in key industries. Allient is recognized worldwide for its precision Motion, Controls, and Power products for specific industries. The strategic move aims to enhance the company's position in rapidly growing sectors, delivering lasting benefits to customers.

news.headline: Heath Sorenson appointed as Executive VP & CEO of Associated Trust Company starting Feb 1, 2025. Announcement by Associated Banc-Corp.
news.summary: Heath Sorenson is set to assume the position of executive vice president, managing director, and CEO of Associated Trust Company starting February 1, 2025 in Green Bay, Wisconsin. The news was revealed on December 11, 2024. He will be taking over the role at Associated Banc-Corp, traded under the symbol NYSE: ASB. This announcement marks a significant development in the company's leadership, with Sorenson poised to lead with his new responsibilities.

news.headline: Top-pick free online image translator for PC highlighted in New York on Dec 11, 2024 - Key for tasks like reading signs, menus, with emphasis on accuracy & language support.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in New York City, it was reported that having the ability to translate text from images is crucial for various daily activities such as reading signs, menus, social media content, or product reviews. The accuracy and language coverage of AI image translation tools can vary significantly, making it vital to select a reliable option to ensure effective communication.

news.headline: French companies must disclose voting rights and share capital information in accordance with regulations.
news.summary: Under the provisions of articles L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and 223-16 of the General Regulation of the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des Marchés Financiers), companies are required to disclose important financial information to the public. These regulations govern the transparency and accountability of businesses operating in France. Failure to comply with these regulations can result in penalties or legal consequences. It is essential for companies to adhere to these guidelines to maintain trust and integrity within the financial markets.

news.headline: Copa Holdings (NYSE: CPA) releases November 2024 traffic stats.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Panama City witnessed the release of preliminary passenger traffic statistics for November 2024 by Copa Holdings, S.A. (NYSE: CPA).

news.headline: Northrop Grumman adds $3 billion to share repurchase, totaling authorized amount at $4.2 billion. Market-driven buybacks planned.
news.summary: In Falls Church, Virginia, on December 11, 2024, aerospace company Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) revealed an extension in their common stock repurchase program. The board of directors gave the green light for an extra $3 billion, boosting the total authorized amount to around $4.2 billion. This move allows for share buybacks to occur sporadically, dependent on market circumstances and at the discretion of management, whether through open market operations or private negotiations.

news.headline: Flexsteel Industries declares $0.17 quarterly dividend per share, 332nd consecutive, payable Jan. 8, 2025. New share repurchase program authorized.
news.summary: Flexsteel Industries, a company listed on NASDAQ as FLXS and based in Dubuque, Iowa, has recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.17 per share. This dividend is slated to be paid on January 8, 2025, to shareholders recorded on December 28, 2024. The company has been providing cash dividends on its common stock yearly since 1938, marking this as their 332nd consecutive quarterly cash dividend. Additionally, on December 11, 2024, Flexsteel's Board of Directors sanctioned a new share repurchase initiative.

news.headline: Chewy, Inc. plans $500 million public offering of Class A common stock by selling stockholder; Concurrent share repurchase.
news.summary: In Plantation, Florida, Chewy, Inc. revealed the launch of a new public offering of $500 million worth of shares of its Class A common stock. The selling stockholder, Buddy Chester Sub LLC, linked to BC Partners Advisors LP, Chewy’s primary shareholder, is responsible for this offering. Chewy, known as a go-to for pet owners and industry partners, hopes to benefit from this transaction involving shares priced at $0.01 per share.

news.headline: $ADBE Adobe Q4 2024 Earnings
Dun & Bradstreet achieves five-star rankings in Chartis Research RiskTech Quadrant for KYC Data Solutions 2024.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Dun & Bradstreet (NYSE:DNB), a key player in business decisioning data and analytics, has secured the position of category leader in the Chartis Research RiskTech Quadrant for KYC Data Solutions 2024 for three consecutive years. The company received five-star ratings for its exceptional sanctions and watchlist data, corporate structure information, entity relationships, and trade data. Brian Filan expressed gratitude for the recognition, stating, "Being recognized by Chartis for our KYC data solutions is a privilege."

news.headline: BSD Builders, specializing in healthcare construction, partners with 2G Energy, a cogeneration leader, for advanced microgrid solutions.
news.summary: In San Diego on December 11, 2024, BSD Builders, Inc., a construction company with a focus on healthcare projects, revealed a new alliance with 2G Energy Inc., a leading provider of energy solutions like cogeneration. This partnership aims to concentrate on creating innovative designs and strategies.

news.headline: MEDIROM Healthcare closes public offering of 2,860,000 ADS at $1.75 per share, raising approx $5 million. Underwriters get option for 429,000 more shares.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) disclosed the conclusion of its public offering of 2,860,000 American Depositary Shares, valued at $1.75 per share, culminating in total gross proceeds nearing $5,000,000. Post deduction of underwriting discounts and offering expenses, the company also allotted the underwriters a 45-day choice to procure up to 429,000 additional American Depositary Shares for handling over-allotments at the public offering price, excluding the underwriting discount. MEDIROM is a holistic healthcare entity managing 300+ wellness salons in Japan, offering healthcare provisions.

news.headline: BRT Apartments Corp. declares $0.25 quarterly dividend, payable on Jan 6, 2025, to stockholders of record on Dec 23, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Great Neck, NY, BRT Apartments Corp. (NYSE:BRT), disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share. Scheduled to be paid on January 6, 2025, this dividend is targeted towards stockholders as of December 23, 2024. BRT projects that this dividend will contribute to 2025 Federal taxable income.

news.headline: Financial Institutions, Inc. launches common stock offering on Nasdaq (FISI) with underwriters granted a 30-day option.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Financial Institutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: FISI), the parent company of Five Star Bank and Courier Capital, LLC, initiated an underwritten public offering of its common stock. The offering includes the granting of a 30-day option to the underwriters to acquire extra shares of the common stock.

news.headline: Tapestry, Inc. closes $1.5B senior unsecured notes offering ($750M due 2030, $750M due 2035) to repay loans.
news.summary: In New York, Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), known for its famous brands including Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman, revealed the completion of its public offering. This included $750.0 million in 5.100% senior unsecured notes due 2030 and $750.0 million in 5.500% senior unsecured notes due 2035. The funds raised, along with existing cash reserves, will be utilized by the company to settle outstanding loan obligations.

news.headline: Ark Restaurants Corp. will hold a conference call on Dec 17, 2024, at 11 am ET to discuss financial results. Toll-Free - 1-877-407-4018 / Toll/International - 1-201-689-8471.
news.summary: Ark Restaurants Corp. (NASDAQ:ARKR) is scheduled to hold a conference call on December 17, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending on September 28, 2024. Investors and analysts can participate by dialing Toll-Free at 1-877-407-4018 or Toll/International at 1-201-689-8471. In addition to the call, the Company will broadcast the conference over the Internet. More information on accessing the broadcast can be found at ht.

news.headline: J.Jill CEO Claire Spofford to retire after a distinguished career in retail, remains till April 2025. Executive search for successor underway.
news.summary: Quincy, Massachusetts - J.Jill, Inc., a leading omnichannel retailer and well-known women's apparel brand, disclosed today that Claire Spofford, the company's President and CEO, will be retiring following a successful career in the retail industry. J.Jill has enlisted the support of an executive search firm to find a replacement for her. Ms. Spofford is anticipated to continue in her position until April 2025, collaborating closely with the leadership team. J.Jill is traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol JILL.

news.headline: Starbucks declares a $0.61 per share quarterly cash dividend, payable on February 28, 2025. Ethical coffee sourcing since 1971.
news.summary: In Seattle, Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.61 per share on its Common Stock. The dividend is set to be paid on February 28, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 14, 2025. Starbucks, founded in 1971, focuses on ethically sourcing and roasting premium arabica coffee. With over 40,000 global locations, the company continues its dedication to quality and sustainability.

news.headline: J.Jill, Inc. reports Q3 2024 results. CEO Claire Spofford mentions in-line performance, emphasizing disciplined operating model.
news.summary: In Quincy, Massachusetts, J.Jill, Inc. (NYSE: JILL) released its financial report for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024. Claire Spofford, the company's President and CEO, highlighted that the results met expectations. The company's disciplined operating model led to strong overall margin performance for the quarter. Despite customers being selective with their purchases, the company has maintained a healthy performance. The specific financial figures for the quarter were not disclosed in the statement.

news.headline: Cannabist Co. launches dreamt brand in Maryland, plans expansion to other markets in 2025. Acquired brand from Ciencia Labs portfolio.
news.summary: In New York, The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc. (Cboe CA: CBST) (OTCQX: CBSTF) (FSE: 3LP) revealed plans to introduce the brand dreamt in Maryland, with expansion to more markets and products anticipated in 2025. The Company, a leading producer and seller of cannabis products in the U.S., acquired the dreamt brand as part of its purchase of the Ciencia Labs portfolio. The dreamt brand launch marks a significant move for the company in its strategic growth.

news.headline: Oil-Dri's Board of Directors declares quarterly dividends of $0.155 per share for Common Stock and $0.1165 per Class B Stock.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, the Board of Directors of Oil-Dri Corporation of America (NYSE: ODC) announced the declaration of quarterly cash dividends. Shareholders of the Company's Common Stock will receive $0.155 per share, while those holding Class B Stock will receive $0.1165 per share.

news.headline: Owner of Tommy Bahama, Lilly Pulitzer, and Johnny Was, based in Oxford, announces third quarter financial results.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased significantly to 4%, marking a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, the stock market experienced a noteworthy surge, with the S&P 500 index reaching an all-time high of 4,200 points. This notable increase in stock prices has resulted in a boost for investors, signaling a strong economic recovery. Furthermore, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was reported at 6.4%, surpassing expectations and indicating robust economic expansion. Overall, these indicators highlight a promising outlook for the economy, showcasing signs of recovery and growth.

news.headline: Agilysys appointed Lisa Pope as a new board member, increasing total members to eight. Lisa is President of Epicor.
news.summary: Agilysys, Inc. revealed today that it has expanded its Board of Directors from seven to eight members on December 5, 2024. This decision led to the appointment of Lisa Pope to occupy the newly established director position. It is anticipated that Ms. Pope will be up for election by the Company’s stockholders during the annual stockholders meeting in 2025. Lisa Pope, the current President of Epicor, assumes this role as Agilysys continues to enhance its leadership team.

news.headline: FiscalNote will be attending investor conferences soon, sharing insights with stakeholders.
news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This positive trend is reflected in the creation of 250,000 new jobs in the last month alone. The economy seems to be rebounding, with GDP growth reaching 3.6% in the last quarter. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% increase in the past month, indicating growing investor confidence. Consumer spending has also risen by 5% as people feel more optimistic about the economic outlook. These figures suggest a promising recovery and stability in the overall financial landscape.

news.headline: Adobe's Q4 and fiscal year 2024 revenue hit record highs, with "record FY24 revenue" and strong demand. CEO praises innovation and tech platforms.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Adobe (Nasdaq: ADBE) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 that concluded on November 29, 2024. The company achieved record revenue for FY24, showcasing robust demand and emphasizing the critical positions held by Creative Cloud, Document Cloud, and Experience Cloud in driving the AI economy. According to Adobe's chair and CEO, Shantanu Narayen, the company's distinct technology platforms, quick innovation pace, diverse go-to-market strategies, and seamless integration were instrumental in this success.

news.headline: Data breach at ConnectOnCall.com, LLC affecting personal info of healthcare providers and patients; incident discovered on May 12, 2024.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware, ConnectOnCall.com, LLC offers the product "ConnectOnCall" to healthcare providers for enhancing after-hours call processes and patient communication. A recent discovery by ConnectOnCall revealed an incident involving personal information from communication between patients and providers using the service. The company became aware of this issue on May 12, 2024, taking immediate action.
